scripts.lint: biome check src test migrations --fix --unsafe && npm run lint:sql
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:intg
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run test:unit && npm run test:intg && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/rummy_test_diag && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.example --env-file-if-exists=.env --env-file-if-exists=.env.test --test-concurrency=1 --test-force-exit --test-reporter=spec --test $(find test/e2e -name "*.test.js") 2>&1 | tee /tmp/rummy_test_diag/e2e_$(date +%Y%m%dT%H%M%S).log'
scripts.test:live: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/rummy_test_diag && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.example --env-file-if-exists=.env --env-file-if-exists=.env.test --test-concurrency=1 --test-force-exit --test-reporter=spec --test $(find test/live -name "*.test.js") 2>&1 | tee /tmp/rummy_test_diag/live_$(date +%Y%m%dT%H%M%S).log'
scripts.test:clean: rm -rf test/lme/results test/swe/results test/swe/repos test/tmp /tmp/rummy_test_diag /tmp/rummy_test_*.db /tmp/rummy_test_*.db-shm /tmp/rummy_test_*.db-wal && echo 'Test artifacts cleaned.'
scripts.test:lme: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/rummy_test_diag && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.example --env-file-if-exists=.env --env-file-if-exists=.env.test test/lme/runner.js "$@" 2>&1 | tee /tmp/rummy_test_diag/lme_$(date +%Y%m%dT%H%M%S).log' --
scripts.test:swe: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/rummy_test_diag && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.example --env-file-if-exists=.env --env-file-if-exists=.env.test test/swe/runner.js "$@" 2>&1 | tee /tmp/rummy_test_diag/swe_$(date +%Y%m%dT%H%M%S).log' --
scripts.test:tbench: bash -c 'set -o pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/rummy_test_diag && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.example --env-file-if-exists=.env --env-file-if-exists=.env.tbench test/tbench/runner.js "$@" 2>&1 | tee /tmp/rummy_test_diag/tbench_$(date +%Y%m%dT%H%M%S).log' --
